message:
🐛 fix: Pass prompt as argument not stdin to claude-code

Claude Code CLI expects the prompt as a command-line argument,
not from stdin via pipe.

Changed: echo "$PROMPT" | claude-code --print
To: claude-code --print "$PROMPT"

This should finally allow Claude Code to actually run and analyze issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -101,7 +101,7 @@ jobs:
           Please implement the fix now."
 
           # Run Claude Code in non-interactive mode using npx
-          echo "$PROMPT" | npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code --print || true
+          npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code --print "$PROMPT" || true
 
       - name: Check for changes
         id: check_changes
